title: Gowramma
desc: Venky, a boy from a small town, is sent to the city by his father for a job.

title: Ee Bandhana
desc: An old couple who are attached to each other is ill-treated by their children.

title: Kotigobba 3
desc: ACP Kishore and Interpol target conman Satya as he goes on to commit international crimes.

title: Majili
desc: After being abandoned by Anshu, Poorna takes to alcohol but Sravani's love changes him.

title: Neenello Naanalle
desc: Santosh returns to India to attend a wedding and meets a young girl who changes his life.

title: Ondagi Baalu
desc: After marrying his lover, Tyagaraj is separated from his family for her selfish gains.

title: Shiva Shakthi
desc: Tarakasura's sons undertake a strenuous worship of Goddess Parvati. When she doesn't respond, Lord Shiv and the Goddess engage in a heated argument. S01 E184.

title: Toss
desc: Sandeep and Madhav toss a coin to decide who gets to make a move on the girl they like.

title: Shiva Shakthi
desc: Kartikeya's whereabouts are discovered by Tarakasura prompting him to make a drastic decision to end his own life. In response, Lord Shiva vows to fulfill his promise of protecting Kartikeya. S01 E193.

title: Shiva Shakthi
desc: Tarakasura's sons plead with Tripura Sundari to protect them from Lord Shiva. Parvati and Shiva face off in the battle of Karma. Who will win?. S01 E194.

title: Neenello Naanalle
desc: Santosh returns to India to attend a wedding and meets a young girl who changes his life.

title: Kotee
desc: Kotee, an honest man, defies a ruthless criminal, but soon faces a life-altering choice.

title: Madhagaja
desc: The son of a don returns to a world of violence after being away from it for years.

title: Inspector Gabbar
desc: An honest officer fights his stepbrother, who joins hands with a notorious criminal.

title: Maharaja
desc: Jealousy ensues between Kiran and his adopted brother, Surya, thereby creating a rift between them.

title: Pakkadmane Hudugi
desc: Based on the film 'Padosan' by Jyoti Swaroop.

title: Shiva Shakthi
desc: At the universe's dawn, Lord Shiva and Goddess Parvati encounter divine love, creating a timeless tale of eternal devotion that inspires generations to come.

title: Gadiyara
desc: Inspired by a true story, Gadiyara revolves around the secret of an old royal family of Karnataka and how, over time, greed for the ancient treasure leads to destruction.

title: Shiva Shakthi
desc: At the universe's dawn, Lord Shiva and Goddess Parvati encounter divine love, creating a timeless tale of eternal devotion that inspires generations to come.

title: Shiva Shakthi
desc: At the universe's dawn, Lord Shiva and Goddess Parvati encounter divine love, creating a timeless tale of eternal devotion that inspires generations to come.

title: Maharaja
desc: Rajashekhar has two sons, Surya and Kiran, but Surya is his adopted child. Surya is very hardworking and makes many sacrifices for the family, thereby inciting jealousy in his brother's heart.
